judge_reason: Description B adds specific quoted text ('CLOSURE' stamp and handwritten numbers '62-83894-376') that is completely absent from Description A, which claims the folder is 'mostly blank'.
original_image_tags: A standard tan/brown manila folder, appearing aged, with two hole-punches at the top edge. The folder is mostly blank, showing vertical crease lines.
